about.heroTitle: Cross-device file transfer that respects your
about.heroDesc: FileIO is a privacy-first browser tool for cross-device file transfer and online clipboard sync. Send files from your phone to your PC (or the other way around) instantly — no app install, no signup, no cloud upload. The fast, free AirDrop alternative for Windows, iPhone, Android, and Mac.
about.privacyDesc: Every transfer runs end-to-end encrypted over WebRTC peer-to-peer, with QR-code pairing in the browser. Files and text never touch our servers. Use it as a wireless file transfer tool, an online clipboard between phone and PC, or a quick way to send large videos and documents across devices.
about.accessDesc: No login walls, no feature gates, no hidden fees. Cross-device file transfer should be open to everyone — every browser, every platform.
about.transparentDesc: Open architecture. AES-256-GCM encryption, WebRTC P2P, and zero-knowledge design — the security model is auditable and the code is inspectable.
about.noNoiseDesc: Open the page on phone and PC, scan a QR code, drop a file or paste a snippet, and it is sent. No popups, no upsells, no app to install. The same workflow as a shared online clipboard or AirDrop, but in your browser.
about.securityDesc: All cross-device file and text transfers use AES-256-GCM end-to-end encryption over WebRTC peer-to-peer connections. Pairing happens via QR code in the browser. Sessions are ephemeral and we do not log, store, or analyze the content you send.
about.toolsCompareDesc: FileIO offers two ways to move a file depending on whether both devices are online together.
about.toolA_card: Direct WebRTC peer-to-peer between phone and PC. Files and text never touch our servers — the signaling host only relays the pairing handshake. Best when both sides are online at the same time.
about.toolB_card: Async file drop. Upload now, share the link or QR code, recipient downloads later. Files sit on Cloudflare R2 for up to 3 days (single-use by default) and are permanently deleted after first download or on expiry.
about.toolB_badge: Temporary server storage · Up to 3 days

contact.title: Contact & Feedback
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out with questions, feedback, or feature requests.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.successMsg: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.secureDesc: Your message is sent over encrypted channels. We never share your information with third parties.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.commitDesc: At FileIO, your privacy is not just a feature. It's our foundation. We've built every tool with zero-knowledge principles. Your data is processed locally in your browser or transferred peer-to-peer. We literally cannot see what you're doing.
privacy.appliesToAll: This policy applies to all FileIO tools and services.
privacy.toolADesc: All file and text transfers are peer-to-peer with end-to-end encryption. Nothing passes through our servers.
privacy.clauseCookiesContent: We use only two cookies: tp_lang (your language preference) and tp_theme (your theme preference). No tracking cookies, no analytics cookies, no third-party cookies.
privacy.clauseAnalyticsContent: We use privacy-respecting analytics to understand basic usage patterns. No personal data is collected. We do not use Google Analytics or any fingerprinting technology.
privacy.clauseThirdPartyContent: We may display ads via Google AdSense in the future. Google's advertising cookies are governed by Google's own privacy policy. You can opt out via your browser settings or our cookie management page.
privacy.clauseRetentionContent: We retain no user data. Transfer sessions are ephemeral. Clipboard rooms auto-expire after 24 hours. QR codes are generated locally and never stored on our servers.
privacy.ctaDesc: We're happy to explain anything in more detail.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using FileIO ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part, please do not use our Service.

description.title: Description of Service
description.content: FileIO provides two free browser-based file-transfer tools. (1) Text & File Transfer: WebRTC peer-to-peer transfer between phone and PC with QR-code pairing; content never touches our servers. (2) Quick Share: temporary server-assisted file sharing via Cloudflare R2 — uploaded files expire within 3 days or after the first download (whichever comes first) and are deleted permanently.

responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content: You may not use the Service for illegal purposes. You are responsible for the content you transfer or share. You must not attempt to abuse, exploit, or overload the Service.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.content: Your use of the Service is governed by our Privacy Policy. Text & File Transfer uses peer-to-peer encryption and ephemeral sessions — we cannot see the content. Quick Share temporarily stores the uploaded file on Cloudflare R2 until the first download or expiry (max 3 days), then deletes it. We do not scan, analyze, or sell uploaded content, and we do not collect personal data beyond standard request logs.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Service, including its design system, code, and branding, is the property of FileIO. You may use the tools freely but may not reproduce or redistribute the Service itself.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for data loss during transfers, service interruptions, or any damages resulting from the use of the Service.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated through the Service. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

usercontent.title: User-Uploaded Content (Quick Share)
usercontent.content: When you use Quick Share you are responsible for the content you upload. You must not upload: illegal material; content that infringes intellectual-property rights; malicious software, viruses, or executable payloads intended to harm others; content that violates applicable laws. We reserve the right to delete any uploaded file at any time, without notice, if we believe in good faith it violates these terms. Uploaded files are auto-deleted within 3 days regardless.

error404.title: Page not
error404.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.

toolA.title: Phone-PC File & Text Transfer
toolA.quickShareHintBigFile: Large files transfer more reliably via Quick Share.
toolA.quickShareHintRelay: Your network is routing through a relay — Quick Share is faster for big files.

toolA.scanQr: Scan the QR code or visit
toolA.manualDesc: Use QR scan or copy link first; only enter this Room ID manually if scanning is unavailable.
toolA.docPrivateDesc: Traffic is encrypted in transit via WebRTC DTLS. Our signaling server routes the pairing handshake only — it never sees your files or text.
toolA.docFrictionDesc: No account needed. Just scan, drop a file or paste text, and go.
toolA.docExpiringDesc: Files and text travel directly between your phone and PC over a peer-to-peer connection. Nothing is uploaded to our servers.
toolA.securityTipDesc: Ensure this code matches the one on your mobile screen to verify the connection is authentic.
toolA.checkDeviceCode: Check your device and confirm if these numbers align.
toolA.dataNotStoredDesc: All transfers are ephemeral and encrypted end-to-end.
toolA.successDesc: Your assets have been securely transmitted through the FileIO encrypted pipeline.
toolA.zeroKnowledgeDesc: Data is auto-deleted after download or expiration.
toolA.deviceHistoryDesc: Zero-step secure handshake for your trusted ecosystem.
toolA.autoForgetDesc: Devices inactive for 30 days are automatically removed.
toolA.transferHistoryDesc: Manage and review your past digital exchanges.
toolA.e2eeAuditDesc: Verification details for active transfer instance.
toolA.hkdfDesc: Identity keys matched via Argon2id hashing.

toolA.mobileConnectingDesc: Setting up a secure peer-to-peer connection. This usually takes a few seconds.
toolA.desktopTextPlaceholder: Type a message and press Enter...
toolA.introSubtitle: FileIO is a free, no-install browser tool — a temporary clipboard room plus instant cross-device file transfer between phone and PC. Scan the QR code on both devices to start a private, end-to-end encrypted session.
